docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,303.43 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT NG ANNA O.L./NAWAL INC. DBA PHOTO VISION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-29-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF OCT-07-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NG ANNA O.L./NAWAL INC. DBA PHOTO VISION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG ANNA O.L./NAWAL INC. DBA PHOTO VISION $1,303.43 PRINCIPAL, $30.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,334.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONT. REQUEST SENT BACK TO ANNA NG FOR FEE, CAME BACK, UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NG ANNA O.L./NAWAL INC. DBA PHOTO VISION
